recommendations.title: A Letter to Three Wives
recommendations.overview: A letter is addressed to three wives from their 'best friend', announcing that she's running away with one of their husbands – but she doesn't specify which one.

recommendations.title: The Ghost and Mrs. Muir
recommendations.overview: In 1900, young widow Lucy Muir learns that her seaside cottage is haunted and forms a unique relationship with the ghost.

recommendations.title: Sleuth
recommendations.overview: A man who loves games and theatre invites his wife's lover to meet, setting up a battle of wits with potentially deadly results.

recommendations.title: No Way Out
recommendations.overview: Two hoodlum brothers are brought into hospital for gunshot wounds, and when one dies, the other accuses their Black doctor of murder.

recommendations.title: All About Eve
recommendations.overview: From the moment she glimpses her idol at the stage door, Eve Harrington is determined to take the reins of power away from the great actress Margo Channing. Eve maneuvers her way into Margo's Broadway role, becomes a sensation and even causes turmoil

recommendations.title: There Was a Crooked Man...
recommendations.overview: A charming but ruthless criminal is sent to a remote Arizona prison, where he enlists the help of his cellmates in an escape attempt with the promise of sharing his hidden loot.

recommendations.title: Dragonwyck
recommendations.overview: A simple Connecticut farm girl is recruited by a distant relative, an aristocratic patroon, to be governess to his young daughter in his Hudson Valley mansion.

recommendations.title: Suddenly, Last Summer
recommendations.overview: The only son of wealthy widow Violet Venable dies while on vacation with his cousin Catherine. What the girl saw was so horrible that she went insane; now Mrs. Venable wants Catherine lobotomized to cover up the truth.

recommendations.title: Cleopatra
recommendations.overview: Determined to hold on to the throne, Cleopatra seduces the Roman emperor Julius Caesar. When Caesar is murdered, she redirects her attentions to his general, Marc Antony, who vows to take power—but Caesar’s successor has other plans.

recommendations.title: Julius Caesar
recommendations.overview: The growing ambition of Julius Caesar is a source of major concern to his close friend Brutus. Cassius persuades him to participate in his plot to assassinate Caesar but both have sorely underestimated Mark Antony.
